recommendations.title: Alien Abduction
recommendations.overview: A vacationing family encounters an alien threat in this pulse-pounding thriller based on the real-life Brown Mountain Lights phenomenon in North Carolina.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: The 8th Night
recommendations.overview: With prayer beads in one hand and an ax in the other, a monk hunts down a millennia-old spirit that's possessing humans and unleashing hell on Earth.

recommendations.title: Hungerford
recommendations.overview: The lives of a group of teenagers are turned upside down when their town is taken over by sinister forces.

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.

recommendations.title: Paradise
recommendations.overview: A man sees the dark side of the time-manipulating biotech company he works for when a crushing debt forces his wife to give up 40 years of her own life.

recommendations.title: The Beach House
recommendations.overview: A romantic getaway for two troubled college sweethearts turns into a struggle for survival when unexpected guests – and the surrounding environment – exhibit signs of a mysterious infection.

recommendations.title: Road Train
recommendations.overview: A supernatural thriller about a group of teenagers menaced by a driver-less train in the Australian outback.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Mac & Devin Go to High School
recommendations.overview: A comedy that follows two high school students -- one overachiever struggling to write his valedictorian speech, the other a senior now going on his 15th year of school.
